title: Ladies Hifth Programme
about: Pioneering an innovative Hifth structure designed for busy moms, mature students, and professionals. Students choose from one of four streams based on their memorisation goal.
subjects: Oft-Recited Suwar — Mulk, Yasin, Sajdah, Waqi'ah, Rahman, Kahf
Designated time in class to prepare Sabaq / New Lessons
Daily Nasihah + Tajwīd from the Murshid al-Qari
prerequisites: None — except a desire to learn the Book of Allah. Targeted at students aged 20+.
